title: Move Host IDMAppings code from util to unshare
body:
This will make vendoring in pkg/unshare easier into other
packages like skopeo.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Tests are not yet happy:
```
pkg/unshare/unshare_test.go:91:25: undefined: util.GetHostIDMappings
```

Otherwise, LGTM. Thanks a lot for the fix, @rhatdan!
